betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Network Topology: Switches & Cables§f

§aConnect multiple machines and route data packets across your base network!§f
Computers, screens, servers, and external devices can communicate and exchange information by forming a wired or wireless network.

§6Network Infrastructure§f:
§b• Network Cable§f: Used to link components physically. Power and data packets travel along these lines.
§b• Network Card (LAN)§f: An expansion card inserted into a case or server. Enables a machine to send and receive local network messages.
§b• Wireless Network Card§f: Enables wireless broadcast transmissions. Its range is proportional to power consumption (1 block per strength, cost: §e0.05 energy per unit of range§f).
§b• Access Point§f: Bridges wired networks to wireless devices (like robots or drones). Contains a buffer of §e600 energy§f.

§6Switches & Upgrades§f:
A §bSwitch§f routes network packets between separate sub-networks to prevent congestion. By default, switches have the following limitations:
§b• Relay Delay§f: §e5 ticks§f between packet forwarding cycles.
§b• Queue Size§f: §e20 packets§f max buffer.
§b• Switch Upgrades§f: You can upgrade switches by inserting hardware:
  §e• CPU Upgrade§f: Reduces relay delay by §a1.5 ticks per CPU tier§f.
  §e• HDD Upgrade§f: Increases queue size by §a10 packets per HDD tier§f to handle large bursts.
  §e• RAM Upgrade§f: Increases forwarded packet amount by §a1 per half-tier of RAM§f.

§cApplied Energistics 2 Gate: 1k Storage Cells§f:
Networking hardware is critical for early digital storage. To craft the base storage components for AE2, you need OpenComputers networking parts:
§b• ME 1k Storage Component§f & §bME 1k Fluid Storage Component§f:
  Both require the following OpenComputers components in their crafting recipes:
  §e• 1× Server (Tier 2)§f (`opencomputers:component:14`)
  §e• 1× Network Card§f (`opencomputers:card:6`)
  §e• 1× EEPROM§f (`opencomputers:storage`)
  §e• 1× Logic Processor§f (`appliedenergistics2:material:22`)
  §e• 1× Basic / Advanced Circuit§f (`advancedrocketry:ic:4` or `ic:5`)
Ensure your computer manufacturing line is automated to feed these components into your AE2 crafting system!
